# 🚀 SocialPulse — Pull Request Template

## 📝 Description
<!-- Briefly describe the changes introduced in this PR. List any related issues or Kanban tasks. -->
Relates to: [WW-X.X] Task Name

## 🏗️ Type of Change
- [ ] 🟢 New Feature (feat)
- [ ] 🔴 Bug Fix (fix)
- [ ] 🟡 Refactor (refactor)
- [ ] 🔵 Documentation (docs)
- [ ] ⚙️ CI/CD / Config (chore)

## ✅ Quality Checklist (Mandatory)
- [ ] **SOLID**: Does each class/module do ONE thing?
- [ ] **Security**: No hardcoded secrets, all user input validated, sanitized, and parameterized.
- [ ] **Tests**: Are unit/integration tests included? (FIRST principles followed).
- [ ] **Errors**: Are all failure paths handled and logged?
- [ ] **Clean History**: Rebased against `main` and squash-ready?
